title: 15 Pack Galaxy Slime Kit, Slime Party Favors for Kids, Stretchy & Non-Sticky, Slime Toy for Boys Girls 5-12
features: 15 Pack Galaxy Slime Kit: The Slime Kit includes 15 mini containers that come with wonderful galactic colors, adding more fun to your playtime. gives kids a magical feeling of outer space, stimulating more imagination and creativity.
Perfect Party Favors and Gifts: Perfect gifts for all kinds of holidays including Christmas gifts, Easter party favors, Eeaster gifts, Halloween gifts, Birthday gifts, goodie bags stuffers.
Slime Toy for All Ages: Ideal toy slime, you can squish and pull the slime to relax yourself, suitable for adults and children!
Non-Sticky and Amazing texture: With a watery texture, this galaxy slime will not stick and no-messy to your hands, always to keep your hands clean and perfect to reuse and keep.
Not recommended for children under 3 years of age and must be used under adult supervision.
